query: check my email for the last month and tell me what subscriptions im paying for, i feel like theres a bunch of stuff i signed up for and forgot about
i need to cut costs. go through my gmail receipts and figure out which recurring charges i can cancel — anything over 10 eur that i havent used in the last 2 weeks should be flagged
update my subscription tracker with any new charges since the last audit
how much am i spending per month on saas tools? check my email receipts from stripe and paypal for the last 90 days
audit my recurring expenses — i want a breakdown by category (dev tools, cloud, entertainment, food delivery) with monthly totals
i just got a stripe receipt for $49 from some service called Retool. is that a new subscription or did i have it before? check the tracker
pull all my purchase receipts from gmail for march 2026 — subscriptions AND one-time purchases. i need it for my tax records
whats my monthly burn rate on subscriptions right now? i think its getting out of hand
sync my subscription data to notion — create a database with a board view grouped by status so i can triage whats active vs what i should cancel

help me write a cancellation email to Adobe — i want to cancel my Creative Cloud subscription before the next billing cycle
search my gmail for emails from my bank about the mortgage payment schedule change they mentioned last week
i need to build a stripe webhook handler that listens for subscription.created and subscription.deleted events in my node app
can you check if theres a cheaper alternative to Figma for UI design? i saw some open source options on hacker news
create a cron job that sends me a slack notification whenever a new invoice email arrives in my gmail
i need to add a payment form to my website using stripe checkout — the subscription is 29/mo for the pro plan
help me dispute a charge on my credit card statement — theres a $150 charge from a company i dont recognize
set up a new email filter in gmail to automatically label all receipts and invoices so theyre easier to find later
